member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Data.LocalFileStorageProvider
member.summary: File-based implementation of IFileStorageProvider that writes to local disk. Used for local development and as a fallback when Google Drive is unavailable. Files are written to {basePath}/{folder}/{fileName}. Spreadsheet operations use CSV files in {basePath}/sheets/{sheetName}.csv.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Data.LocalFileStorageProvider.#ctor(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Data.LocalFileStorageProvider})
member.summary: File-based implementation of IFileStorageProvider that writes to local disk. Used for local development and as a fallback when Google Drive is unavailable. Files are written to {basePath}/{folder}/{fileName}. Spreadsheet operations use CSV files in {basePath}/sheets/{sheetName}.csv.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Data.NoopFileStorageProvider
member.summary: Noop implementation of IFileStorageProvider used until Google Drive integration is wired up. Silently drops all read/write calls so the pipeline can run without Drive.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Data.NoopFileStorageProvider.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Data.NoopFileStorageProvider})
member.summary: Noop implementation of IFileStorageProvider used until Google Drive integration is wired up. Silently drops all read/write calls so the pipeline can run without Drive.
